pricing.heroSub: Pay only for what you use. No subscription, no auto-renewal.
pricing.creditPacksDesc: Buy credits once, use whenever you want
pricing.oneReadingDesc: Most readings — Destiny Counselor, Tarot, Compatibility — cost 1 credit each. If a larger analysis is needed, the exact cost is shown before you confirm.
pricing.freeFeatureDesc: Selected onboarding tools and this month's fortune calendar are free
pricing.validityDesc: Purchased credits stay valid for 3 months from the purchase date.
pricing.guaranteeDesc: Unused credit packs are fully refundable within 7 days from purchase.
pricing.ctaSub: Try free features first, then pay only for what you use

faqs.a1: 1 credit is deducted each time you use an AI reading — Destiny Counselor counseling, Tarot, or Compatibility. The Yearly/Monthly/Daily Fortune calendar is free for the current month; viewing extended ranges beyond this month costs 1 additional credit.
faqs.a2: Credits are valid for 3 months from the purchase date.
faqs.q3: Do bigger packs give a discount?
faqs.a3: Yes — larger packs offer a lower per-credit rate. The discount is shown on each pack.
faqs.a4: If a reading fails due to a system issue on our end, the consumed credit is automatically restored to your balance. No support request needed.
faqs.a5: Unused credit packs (0 credits used) are fully refundable within 7 days from purchase. Once any credit is consumed, the pack becomes non-refundable.
faqs.q6: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.a6: Major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) are processed securely through Stripe. Apple Pay and Google Pay are available in supported regions.
faqs.q7: Can I get a receipt or tax invoice?
faqs.a7: A payment receipt is automatically emailed to your registered address after checkout. For a business tax invoice, please contact us via the Contact page with your business registration after purchase.
faqs.q8: How long does a refund take to arrive?
faqs.a8: Refunds are submitted to your card issuer immediately upon approval. Funds typically appear in 5–10 business days depending on your issuer; international cards may take slightly longer.

success.title: Payment complete
success.emailNote: A confirmation email has been sent to your registered address.

consent.title: Help us improve
consent.description: We anonymously track which features help you, to keep improving the app. Rejecting still lets you use every feature.
